mapper.select: SELECT cu.*, g.branch_code FROM crm_users cu JOIN gym g ON cu.gym_id = g.id WHERE cu.id = #{id} AND cu.is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_users (id, gym_id, app_user_id, name, email, username, password_hash, role, is_active) VALUES (#{id}, #{gymId}, #{appUserId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{active})
